creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
Hello Gabor,

of course its never a good idea to mess around with a production system. :D

Its revertable, but you should know what you do. Since you are curious it should be better to use a test-build for it. 

You can use the binary packages for the test-build from here. This is FreeBSD 10.3 at amd64:
http://pkg.toco-domains.de/testJail-103-test

Also i can highly recommend the backup routine in combination with ZFS snapshot. Sometimes updates go wrong and a zfs rollback is very very helpful and easier than restoring a backup.

Greetings,
Torsten
